evals.name: search-notes-by-content
evals.prompt: Search my Obsidian vault for notes that mention 'API documentation' and show me the top 5 matches with the matching lines, not just filenames.
evals.expected_output: List of up to 5 notes with surrounding line context showing the match

evals.name: list-tags-by-frequency
evals.prompt: List all tags in my Obsidian vault sorted by how often they're used, top 15 only.
evals.expected_output: Ranked list of tags with usage counts

evals.name: create-zettel-with-tags
evals.prompt: Create a new zettelkasten note in Obsidian titled 'Filesystem vs CLI for Note Access' with tags 'meta' and 'tooling'. Content: a short argument (3-4 sentences) that using filesystem operations on markdown files is more robust than wrapping a GUI app's CLI, because the vault is just plain text and doesn't need the app to be running.
evals.expected_output: A new .md file in the zettelkasten folder with proper naming (YYYYMMDD.HH Title.md), correct tags in frontmatter, and the requested content
